resources.string: All scanning functions happen locally on your device, with no internet connection required. This app is entirely open source, and the code is available for inspection on GitHub.
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes. Scanning happens locally on your device.
Point your camera at a QR code.
Preview the result before opening it.
Camera permission is needed before scanning can start.
Camera could not start on this device.
No app found to open this link.
